SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2026 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APR-16-2026 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE: CHRISTOPHER C. HITE; CLERK: KCCOLOBONG/ASEALE; NOT REPORTED (D318).

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-17-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shirish Malekar, Appellant/Defendant
Dylan Zeng Milligan, Respondent/Plaintiff
Gary Pesola, Respondent/Plaintiff
Varun Ramakrishnan, Respondent/Plaintiff

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties were sworn prior to calling of the case.

Mr. Malekar, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on his own behalf.

The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit A: Twenty-eight (28) pages of various documents.

Mr. Milligan and Mr. Ramakrishnan, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on their own behalf.

The following documentary evidence are introduced:
Exhibit 1: Single page colored picture of two rabbits inside a cage.
Exhibit 2: Eight (8) pages of a document appearing to be printed from realtor.com.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Christopher C. Hite; Clerk: K. Christal Colobong; Not Reported (D318).
